results.description:
A beloved viral romance with over 40 million reads worldwide.

Ruthless Billionaire. Woman Who Resists Him. Workplace Romance.

If he can’t earn her trust, all his money means nothing.

Power is intoxicating.

Giving it to him could cost her everything.

Cara Michal fought for her place on Wall Street, earning every inch of respect in a world that rewards control and punishes weakness. Desire has no place in her carefully managed life.

Until a reckless kiss with a sexy stranger at an office party shatters her restraint.

Branden Duke is a man who has it all—money, power, prestige. He thrives on dominance and discipline, but real connection has always stayed just out of reach —until Cara challenges him in ways no one ever has.

What begins as an irresistible office affair quickly turns dangerous when past secrets resurface and professional lines blur. Choosing each other could mean losing their careers, their reputations, and everything they’ve worked for.

It could also mean discovering a love of a lifetime. 

A sexy, emotionally charged billionaire romance about workplace temptation, power dynamics, and risking it all for love.

***

About the Filthy Rich Men of Manhattan Series

Filthy Rich Men of Manhattan delivers high-heat contemporary romances set among wealth, power, and ambition in New York City. Each story blends emotional intensity with indulgent fantasy, pairing driven heroines with dominant heroes who make love the ultimate risk.

***

⭐ What readers are saying

“If you’re looking for a hot, sexy, emotional read, Virna DePaul delivers!”

“This is an author whose work continues to delight.”

“…intense, intricate, and insomnia-inducing.”

“Steamy, heart-warming, and action-packed!”

“The twists and turns of the fast-paced plot are delightful.” 
--Publisher’s Weekly (Starred Review)

***

📚 Filthy Rich Men of Manhattan Series

Each book can be read as a standalone, but the series is best enjoyed in order.

Filthy Rich Alpha
Filthy Hot Escort
Filthy Dirty Dom
